Environmental Protection.summary: Johnson has consistently opposed major environmental regulations and climate legislation.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Johnson supported the First Step Act but has generally opposed broader reform measures.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Johnson has consistently opposed tax increases on corporations and high earners.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Johnson has opposed federal cannabis legalization efforts.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Johnson has supported restrictions on abortion access and opposed federal protections.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Johnson voted for the Respect for Marriage Act but has opposed other LGBTQ+ legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Baldwin has consistently supported environmental protection and climate action legislation.

Police Accountability.summary: Baldwin has supported police reform measures including the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Baldwin supported the First Step Act and other criminal justice reform measures.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Baldwin has consistently supported tax increases on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate vote, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Baldwin has supported federal cannabis reform and decriminalization efforts.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Baldwin has been a consistent supporter of abortion rights and reproductive healthcare access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Baldwin, the first openly LGBTQ+ Senator from Wisconsin, has championed LGBTQ+ rights legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Public School Funding.summary: Baldwin has supported increased federal funding for public education.
